name: NVCN Corp.
summary: NVCN Corporation does not have significant operations. The company intends to seek new business ventures. Previously, it was engaged in the business of assembling and distributing disposable drug infusion pumps designed for hospital and home pain management applications. The company was formerly known as Novacon Corporation and changed its name to NVCN Corporation in February 2001. NVCN Corporation was incorporated in 1981 and is based in Woodbury, Minnesota.
